creator: lippe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Em Thu, 12 Jun 2008 00:41:30 -0400
The Anarcat <anarcat@anarcat.ath.cx> escreveu:

> On Thu, Jun 12, 2008 at 01:19:28AM -0300, Felippe de Meirelles Motta
> wrote:
> > Hi,
> > 
> > Don't understand well what did you mean by that. Initially, the port
> > should have its PORTNAME = ledgersmb, doing justice to the project
> > name.
> 
> I agree.
> 
> > So I need not have modified the WRKSRC and DISTNAME respectively.
> > Would you change the PORTNAME or do what?
> 
> That part of the change is okay.
> 
> > This patch foot ok, I did
> > several tests before sending it to you.
> 
> That's good to hear.
> 
> > We also have a new official website: www.ledgersmb.org
> 
> I know about the website.
> 
> My main concern was this:
> 
> > > Could you break it down in smaller pieces?
> 
> Basically, your patch does this, as far as I can understand:
> 
>  * changes the port name
>  * upgrade the package
>  * change the install procss (cp vs tar)
>  * fix the makefile ordering
> 
> The problem is I can't really review the last three parts because the
> name change makes the whole pkg-plist change.
> 
> So in short: I would rather have a seperate partch for the port name
> change so that I could review the other changes properly.
> 
> A good way to do that would be to diff from my original patch to
> upgrade to 1.2.13... 
> 
> I have also not objected to the patch but mentionned that I could not
> review it properly.
> 
> A.
> 

Hmm, now I understand. Maybe the better way to you create a
finance/ledgersmb12. Or repocopy finance/ledgersmb to
finance/ledgersmb11 and upgrade the actual on the ports tree. How you
prefer ?

Thanks :)

-- 
lippe@FreeBSD.org
Felippe de Meirelles Motta
